decisions.decision: Display claim age in /status, highlight at 10 min threshold
decisions.rationale: No auto-release — variable task durations make fixed timeouts unreliable
Simple, already works, no new config surface

decisions.decision: Change debugger from inherit to opus
decisions.rationale: Opus best for complex reasoning and root cause analysis
Not needed until CI/CD automation features

constraints: Memory schema changes must be backward-compatible
WORKFLOW.json schema change must not break workflow_validate.py
Plan JSON schema change must be optional
openQuestions: What minimum Claude Code version to pin (when was Agent Teams introduced?)
